title: Visualizing the Boundary of a Set in a Metric Space
description: A Venn diagram showing the relationship between a set A, its interior, boundary, and the surrounding metric space X.
relationships: ∂A is the set of points that are neither strictly inside Int(A) nor strictly outside in Ext(A), but are adjacent to both. It is the intersection of the closure of A and the closure of the complement of A.
